ddls:
CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* First name of the author */,
  "surname" TEXT /* Surname of the author */,
  "middle_name" TEXT /* Middle name of the author */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the author */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the author */,
  "website" TEXT /* Author's website */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Year the author was born */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the author resides */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the author resides */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the author's profile was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the author's profile was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the author (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the book belongs to */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* International Standard Book Number */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Name of the publishing company */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language in which the book is written */,
  "page_count" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the book */,
  "cover_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the book's cover image */,
  "publication_year" INTEGER /* Year the book was published */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who wrote the book */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the book entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the book entry was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the book (e.g., published, unpublished) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors_biography" (
  "bio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each biography entry */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author to whom the biography belongs */,
  "bio_text" TEXT /* Biography text of the author */,
  "awards" TEXT /* List of awards won by the author */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the author */,
  "education" TEXT /* Educational background of the author */,
  "professional_background" TEXT /* Professional background of the author */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the biography entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the biography entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_authors_biography_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., Fiction, Horror) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the genre entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the genre entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genres_parent_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year_awarded" INTEGER /* Year the award was received */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who received the award */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book the award is associated with */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the award */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the award entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the award entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Editor, Admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the book */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes the review has received */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_reviews_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
